title: InterPoll Comment (v1)
description: Replicated Comment object as written/read by commentService.ts. Normative companion to IPP-03.

authorId.description: Currently the deviceId; see IPP-01 identity migration.

parentId.description: Parent comment id for threaded replies.

authorPubkey.description: Schnorr x-only pubkey (hex) of the signer.

contentSignature.description: Schnorr signature over SHA-256 of IPP-02 canonicalJSON of {content, postId, communityId, timestamp:createdAt}.

canonVersion.description: Canonicalization algorithm version for contentSignature. 2 = IPP-02 canonicalJSON. Absent = legacy v1 (buildSignablePayloadV1). See IPP-02 §6.
